scripts.dev: ./scripts/ensure-docker.sh && docker compose up -d && ./scripts/ensure-ollama.sh && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:tunnel: ./scripts/ensure-docker.sh && docker compose up -d && ./scripts/ensure-ollama.sh && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "VITE_HOST=true npm run dev:client" "sleep 5 && npm run tunnel"
scripts.dev:named: ./scripts/ensure-docker.sh && docker compose up -d && ./scripts/ensure-ollama.sh && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "VITE_HOST=true npm run dev:client" "cloudflared tunnel run"
scripts.start:build: npm run build -w @r2/shared && npm run build -w @r2/server && npm run build -w @r2/supervisor && npm start
